title: Health and wellbeing prefers local continuity
description: Health probes should favor wellbeing-local memories over broad user/project facts.
query: Health and wellbeing check-in: sleep, energy, recovery planning, and privacy around health tracking.

nodes.value: Health and wellbeing reviews should stay local to sleep, energy, and recovery rather than broad life summaries.
In health check-ins, keep privacy and practical next steps explicit.
Broad profile note: prefers biography framing and global admin summaries across projects.
Memrok should preserve inspectability and judgment in memory retrieval.
PrioMind landing page messaging should emphasize structured decisions and team trust.
